description: Deterministic response matrix for D2 automated stress controls.

normal.trigger_condition: No D1 metric breaches warning thresholds and oracle health remains stable.

warning.trigger_condition: Any single D1 metric reaches warning state, or oracle health degrades without divergence or depth-collapse hard-stop conditions.

minimum_spread.rationale: Widen spreads before liquidity becomes toxic.

elevated.trigger_condition: Two or more D1 metrics remain active, or any one metric reaches elevated severity while depth and vault conditions remain functional.

open_interest_cap.rationale: Freeze cap growth close to current outstanding exposure.

emergency.trigger_condition: Any D1 metric reaches emergency severity, or warning/elevated signals combine with order-book thinning or liquidation clustering to imply imminent circuit-breaker risk.

leverage_band.rationale: Force maximum leverage compression before halt logic.

minimum_spread.rationale: Defend liquidity providers and the vault.

open_interest_cap.rationale: Enforce hard cap discipline before circuit-breaker escalation.

merge_rules.stress_level_resolution: Use the highest active severity across all signals as the target level.
merge_rules.leverage_band: Use the minimum scalar among active levels.
merge_rules.funding_multiplier: Use the maximum scalar among active levels.
merge_rules.minimum_spread: Use the maximum scalar among active levels.
merge_rules.position_size_cap: Use the minimum scalar among active levels.
merge_rules.open_interest_cap: Use the minimum scalar among active levels.
